likely_cause: Late OBI spike was pinning, not genuine demand. Large sell wall appeared at 83480 immediately after entry.
lesson_learned: Final-5s OBI spikes above 0.7 in trending conditions should reduce confidence by 20 points due to spoofing risk.
regime_adjustment: In trending regimes, apply OBI_vpin_combined threshold: require VPIN < 0.6 when OBI > 0.70.
warning_rule: IF obi_velocity > 0.20 AND obi > 0.70 AND regime == trending THEN confidence -= 20 AND flag 'possible_pin'
